title: heliophila tabularis
intro: Heliophila tabularis, also known as the yellow-flowering Heliophila or the rock heliophila, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Brassicaceae and is native to southern Africa. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including its use in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Heliophila tabularis are attributed to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, and promote wound healing. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
